    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[BioId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[Name], [s].[Name_Ar], [s].[Role], [s].[Role_Ar], [s].[Subtitle], [s].[Subtitle_Ar], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[VerifiedText], [s].[VerifiedText_Ar]
    FROM [Signatures] AS [s]
    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s0] ON [b].[Id] = [s0].[BioId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[BioId], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[Description], [t].[Description_Ar], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[Items], [t].[Items_Ar], [t].[Title], [t].[Title_Ar], [t].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [TechnicalFocuses] AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [b].[Id] = [t0].[BioId]
WHERE [b].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

FROM [Bios] AS [b]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[BioId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[Name], [s].[Name_Ar], [s].[Role], [s].[Role_Ar], [s].[Subtitle], [s].[Subtitle_Ar], [s].[UpdatedAt], [s].[VerifiedText], [s].[VerifiedText_Ar]

    WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [s0] ON [b].[Id] = [s0].[BioId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[BioId], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[Description], [t].[Description_Ar], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[Items], [t].[Items_Ar], [t].[Title], [t].[Title_Ar], [t].[UpdatedAt]

) AS [t0] ON [b].[Id] = [t0].[BioId]

) AS [t0] ON [b].[Id] = [t0].[BioId]

) AS [t0] ON [b].[Id] = [t0].[BioId]

2026-03-12 21:21:25.970 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (130ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT TOP(1) COUNT(*) AS [Total], COUNT(CASE
    WHEN [n0].[IsRead] = CAST(0 AS bit) THEN 1
END) AS [Unread]
FROM (
    SELECT [n].[IsRead], 1 AS [Key]
    FROM [Notifications] AS [n]
    WHERE [n].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [n0]
GROUP BY [n0].[Key]
